def test_output_json_content():
        # Start the server
        server_process = subprocess.Popen(
            ["npx", "tsx", "server.ts"],
            cwd=PROJECT_DIR,
            stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
            stderr=subprocess.PIPE
        )
    
        try:
            # Give the server a moment to start
            time.sleep(2)
    
            # Run the client
            client_process = subprocess.run(
                ["npx", "tsx", "client.ts"],
                cwd=PROJECT_DIR,
                capture_output=True,
                text=True,
                timeout=10
            )
